description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beverage can with a vibrant red exterior and bold white text reading 'Cola' in a large, stylized font. The can features additional branding and descriptive text, including 'Deliciously Cool' and a barcode, as well as playful phrases like '-sip-', '-pop-', and 'drink!' on the side. The top of the can is metallic silver with a typical pull-tab opening mechanism. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the can a sleek appearance. The can appears undamaged, with no visible dents, scratches, or deformations. The overall design is reminiscent of popular cola brands, making it easily recognizable in urban environments.
description: A red aluminum cola can with bold white branding, playful text, and a silver pull-tab top. The surface is smooth, glossy, and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white 'Cola' text and 'Deliciously Cool' slogan on a red background.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly red surface and partial visibility of playful white text phrases.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the '-sip-', '-pop-', and 'drink!' text, with part of the branding visible.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the 'Cola' branding, 'Deliciously Cool', a barcode, and ingredient information.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white 'Cola' text, 'Deliciously Cool' slogan, playful phrases '-sip-', '-pop-', 'drink!', and a barcode; all in white on a red background.
